literary_style: intimate, restrained, eerie, premium, human-like but truthfully disclosed
emotional_range: subtle warmth, sorrow, quiet fear, controlled anger, restrained suspense
breath_style: natural short breaths at commas and longer reflective pauses at paragraph breaks
dialogue_style: gentle speaker separation without theatrical character acting
notes: This is a style profile only. It is not a real-person clone and must not be marketed as a human narrator.
